instruction: There's a stray green status dot on the equals icon. Remove it.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/equals.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M4.499 8.248h15m-15 7.501h15"/></g>
  <circle id="badge" fill="#22c55e" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
  <circle id="badge" fill="#22c55e" cx="24" cy="104" r="5" />
</svg>
